subcodes.first_line: The fire of separation, following the tranquil days of union and communion, hath consumed the soul and melted the heart that lieth before Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آتش انفصال بعد از آسایش ایام وصل و اتصال جانرا سوخته و دلرا گداخته دل پیش تست
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love as fire, @pain of love; love as veil, @consolation and comfort, @nearness and remoteness
